meta.title: Agent Cluster Risk
meta.desc: Clusters agents from the AI Agent Inventory by owner + priority combination and assigns a risk ranking to each cluster.

copilot.prompt_template:
You are a compliance-risk analyst. Given the AI agent inventory below, cluster the agents by each unique (owner, priority) combination. Then risk-rank every cluster.

Agent inventory:
{{agents}}

Risk-ranking rules:
- Immediate priority → base risk weight 4
- Normal priority → base risk weight 3
- Monitor priority → base risk weight 2
- Unassessed priority → base risk weight 1 (unknown = risky)
- Add +1 if the cluster has ≥ 3 agents (concentration risk)
- Add +1 if any agent in the cluster has risk_score ≥ 75
- Multiply Unassessed base weight by 2 (lack of assessment is high risk)

IMPORTANT OUTPUT RULES:
- Return ONLY valid JSON. No markdown fences, no preamble.
- Start with { and end with }.

{
  "clusters": [
    {
      "owner": "<owner name>",
      "priority": "<priority level>",
      "risk_rank": <integer 1=highest risk>,
      "risk_label": "Critical | High | Medium | Low",
      "risk_score": <computed weight>,
      "agent_count": <N>,
      "agents": ["<agent1>", "<agent2>"],
      "max_agent_risk_score": <highest risk_score among agents>,
      "rationale": "<1-line explanation of risk ranking>"
    }
  ],
  "summary": "<1-line overall clustering summary>"
}

compute.expr: '**' & computed_values.cluster_count & '** owner × priority clusters identified. Ranked by composite risk score.'
